description: pm e2e suites. Each suite drives the pm skill headless on one machine (no members, no MCP) through a full plan -> start -> cleanup sprint on the fleet-e2e-toy repo, picking 3 ready P1 beads issues. Success is judged by independent validation gates against the resulting branch + PR (see validate-sprint.mjs), not self-reported checkpoints. Suite groups are by provider: s1=Claude, s7=Gemini, s8=AGY; the .1/.2/.3 sub-variants are the OS matrix.
